sections.label: Verse 1
lines: anglai ah ka pom Aman kei hong kem
Topa in zingvai hong hawm a
Topa ka khuavak hong hi ta

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sam bang zalna peuh van laukha'n hong kem

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa na min kong pahtawi hi
Nang bang adang Pasian om lo
Na hoihnate sinlung ka gel ciang
